Quiz_1.Question: In which year and month did the government combine efforts with private industrial and commercial groups to establish this non-profit foundation, with the mission of assisting the industry in developing Taiwan's foreign trade?

Quiz_2.Question: How many trade professionals does the organization employ, both locally and overseas?

Quiz_3.Question: In which of the following cities in Taiwan does the organization NOT have a local office?

Quiz_4.Question: How many overseas offices are currently in operation?
